sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71468" key="cantiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξαν-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n71468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of or for wool-carding</tr_> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wool-carding,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg008.perseus-grc1:281a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">281a</biblScope></bibl>, al. ; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ -κόν</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg008.perseus-grc1:282b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">282b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
